name: Parque Natural de la Serra d'Espadá — Circular desde Chóvar por la Pista del Puntal de l'Aljub
region_intro: Mountain biking around Chóvar offers access to diverse terrain within the Parque Natural de la Serra d'Espadà. This region is characterized by cork oak forests, unique geological formations, and significant elevation changes. The landscape provides a wide range of trails, from less demanding paths to challenging routes with substantial climbs and descents. Mountain bike trails in Chóvar navigate through protected natural areas, offering varied experiences for riders. Best mountain bike trails around Chóvar The most popular mountain bike trail is Parque Natural de la Serra d'Espadá — Circular desde Chóvar por la Pista del Puntal de l'Aljub, a 31.7 miles (51.1 km) trail that takes 5 hours 26 minutes to complete. This difficult route features substantial elevation gain within the natural park. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Mountain biking loop in the Serra d'Espadá, a difficult 36.1 miles (58.1 km) path. This route traverses varied terrain and offers extensive views across the Serra d'Espadà. Local mountain bikers also love the Bolos Trail – Ascent to Laguna de Soneja loop from Azuébar, a 23.8 miles (38.4 km) trail leading through the Bolos Trail and towards Laguna de Soneja, often completed in about 3 hours 23 minutes. Mountain biking around Chóvar is defined by cork oak forests, geological formations, and significant elevation changes. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate paths to difficult climbs. The routes in Chóvar are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from over 110 reviews. More than 1500 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Chóvar's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available around Chóvar?
A: There are nearly 90 mountain bike trails around Chóvar, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels and preferences. These routes are primarily located within the scenic Parque Natural de la Serra d'Espadà.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Chóvar?
A: The terrain around Chóvar is diverse, characterized by cork oak forests, unique geological formations, and significant elevation changes. You'll find everything from less demanding paths to challenging routes with substantial climbs and descents, often traversing mountain peaks and passes within the Serra d'Espadà Natural Park.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Chóvar?
A: Yes, Chóvar offers trails suitable for beginners. While many routes feature significant elevation, there are 10 easy mountain bike tours available. These provide a good introduction to the region's natural beauty without requiring advanced technical skills.

Q: Which mountain bike trails offer the most challenging rides around Chóvar?
A: For experienced riders seeking a challenge, Chóvar has 28 difficult mountain bike routes. One particularly demanding option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1494768582/mountain-biking-loop-in-the-serra-d-espada" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mountain biking loop in the Serra d'Espadá&lt;/a&gt;, which spans over 58 km with more than 1800 meters of elevation gain, offering extensive views and varied terrain.

Q: Can I find circular mountain bike routes in Chóvar?
A: Yes, many mountain bike routes in Chóvar are circular, allowing you to start and end in the same location. A notable example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e931286949/parque-natural-de-la-serra-d-espada-circular-desde-chovar-por-la-pista-del-puntal-de-l-aljub" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Parque Natural de la Serra d'Espadá — Circular desde Chóvar por la Pista del Puntal de l'Aljub&lt;/a&gt;, a 51 km route with substantial elevation gain.

Q: What are some scenic mountain bike trails with viewpoints in Chóvar?
A: The entire region within the Serra d'Espadà Natural Park offers stunning scenery. Routes often traverse mountain peaks and passes, providing excellent viewpoints. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/33833662" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View of the Espadà Valley – View of Benalí Castle loop from Eslida&lt;/a&gt; offers panoramic vistas of the valley and historical landmarks.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy most about mountain biking in Chóvar?
A: The mountain bike trails around Chóvar are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.5 stars from over 110 reviews. Riders frequently praise the diverse terrain, the beauty of the cork oak forests, and the challenging climbs and descents within the protected natural park.

Q: Are there any interesting landmarks or attractions to see along the mountain bike trails in Chóvar?
A: Yes, the region offers several interesting landmarks. You might encounter the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2472919" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Eslida Pass&lt;/a&gt;, or the charming &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2757154" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Aín Village&lt;/a&gt;. The area also features natural monuments like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1562770" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Peñas Aragonesas&lt;/a&gt;, which can be incorporated into longer routes for a blend of natural beauty and cultural interest.

Q: What is the best season for mountain biking in Chóvar?
A: Chóvar, located in the Parque Natural de la Serra d'Espadà, generally offers pleasant conditions for mountain biking during spring and autumn when temperatures are milder. Summer can be hot, especially at midday, while winter can bring cooler temperatures, though snow is rare at lower elevations.

Q: Are there any routes that pass through mountain passes in the Chóvar area?
A: Yes, the mountainous terrain around Chóvar includes several passes that are often part of mountain bike routes. You can find routes that traverse passes such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2477056" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puerto de la Nevera&lt;/a&gt;, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2972522" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Coll de la Vella&lt;/a&gt;, and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3123568" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Betxí Pass&lt;/a&gt;, offering both challenging climbs and rewarding views.

Q: What is the longest mountain bike route available near Chóvar?
A: One of the longest mountain bike routes in the area is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1494768582/mountain-biking-loop-in-the-serra-d-espada" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mountain biking loop in the Serra d'Espadá&lt;/a&gt;, which covers approximately 58 kilometers and involves significant elevation changes, making it a full-day adventure for experienced riders.
tips: A crisp driveway to the Puntal de l'Aljub. A mediocre tar road leads up to this summit with transmitter systems. From up there you have a fantastic view over the Sierra Espadán and to the sea.
Small pass between Ain and Eslida, very easy to drive, even suitable for normal bikes.
From this point, you can enjoy a wide view of the majestic Benalí Castle, with the impressive surrounding peaks serving as a backdrop. The forest road that leads here is in perfect condition.
It is a beautiful pass that winds towards Ain. There are also excellent views of Benalí Castle.
More than 400 meters of unevenness to enjoy the climb. Good track.
